//ConnectionStrings: Set via env: ConnectionStrings__Postgres (key-value or postgres:// URI), or Db__Host/Port/Name/Username/Password. Local dev value lives in appsettings.Development.json.
//Session: Login sessions live in an HttpOnly cookie holding an opaque id; the server row is the authority. No secret to configure — the token is random per session. See docs/cookie-session-design.md.
//Sharing: Public 'anyone with the link' file shares. PublicBaseUrl is the origin the viewer link is built against — leave empty when the API serves the SPA on one origin (prod); set it to the SPA origin when they differ (dev). PublicAccessEnabled=false is the global kill-switch. See docs/shareable-links-design.md.
//Registration: Signups require this shared invite code. Set Registration__InviteCode as a SECRET env var in production. Empty fails closed: registration is refused entirely.
